subcodes.first_line: This is the Day wherein the Call of God hath been raised from the precincts of the Most Great Prison, summoning the peoples that there is none other God but He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه ارتفع ندآء الله من شطر السجن الاعظم و ینادی الامم بانه لا اله الا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @living waters; water of life, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
